title: Sikkim Budget Explorer
description: Explore the enchanting hill kingdom of Sikkim on a pocket-friendly budget without compromising on its best highlights. From the bustling MG Marg in Gangtok to the sacred Tsomgo Lake shimmering at 12,000 feet, this budget package covers the essential gems of East Sikkim. Cozy homestays and shared transportation keep costs down while delivering an authentic Sikkimese experience.
inclusions: 4 nights budget hotel/homestay accommodation
Daily breakfast and dinner (MAP plan)
Shared vehicle for sightseeing
Tsomgo Lake and Baba Mandir excursion (permits included)
Rumtek Monastery guided visit
exclusions: Nathula Pass permit and visit (extra Rs.200)

days.title: Arrival in Gangtok - MG Marg Evening
days.image: Gangtok MG Marg pedestrian zone colorful evening Sikkim
activities: 12:00 PM - Arrive at New Jalpaiguri (NJP) or Bagdogra, shared taxi to Gangtok (4-5 hrs via NH10)
6:00 PM - Evening stroll on MG Marg pedestrian mall, Sikkim's lively shopping and food street
7:30 PM - Dinner at a local Sikkimese restaurant, try thukpa (noodle soup) and momos

days.title: Gangtok City Sights
days.image: Rumtek Monastery golden roof Gangtok Sikkim Buddhist monastery
activities: 9:00 AM - Rumtek Monastery (24 km from Gangtok) - largest monastery in Sikkim, Golden Stupa
12:30 PM - Visit Enchey Monastery on a hill above Gangtok (200-yr old Nyingma monastery)
3:00 PM - Gangtok Ropeway (3 stations, panoramic city views, Rs.60 each way), Flower Exhibition Centre

days.title: Tsomgo Lake & Baba Mandir
days.image: Tsomgo Lake Chang Lake Gangtok frozen altitude Sikkim mountains
activities: 8:00 AM - Drive to Tsomgo Lake (35 km, 1.5 hrs) - Chang Lake at 3,753 m, yak rides available
11:30 AM - Continue to Baba Mandir (13,200 ft) - shrine of Harbhajan Singh, legendary Indian soldier
2:00 PM - Return to Gangtok, visit Cottage Industries Institute for handicrafts, evening at MG Marg

days.title: Ravangla - Buddha Park
days.image: Ravangla Buddha Park 130 ft Buddha statue South Sikkim valley
activities: 8:30 AM - Drive from Gangtok to Ravangla (65 km, 2.5 hrs) - scenic south Sikkim
11:00 AM - Tathagata Tsal (Buddha Park) - magnificent 130-ft Shakyamuni Buddha statue, beautifully landscaped
2:00 PM - Ralong Monastery - important Karma Kagyu monastery, panoramic Kanchenjunga views, return to Gangtok

days.title: Morning Walk & Departure
days.image: Gangtok morning valley view sunrise Sikkim hills
activities: 7:00 AM - Early morning walk to Do Drul Chorten Stupa - largest stupa in Sikkim, 108 prayer wheels
9:00 AM - Breakfast, visit Directorate of Handicrafts and Handloom for authentic Sikkimese crafts
11:00 AM - Shared taxi to NJP/Bagdogra for onward journey

title: Sikkim Family Himalayan Holiday
description: A wonderful family holiday combining the serenity of Buddhist monasteries, the awe of Himalayan high-altitude lakes, and the wonder of Kanchenjunga views. Children will delight in yak rides at Tsomgo Lake, the cable car ride over Gangtok city, and spotting red pandas at the Sikkim Himalayan Zoological Park. Parents will cherish the spiritual calm of ancient monasteries and the dramatic mountain landscapes.
inclusions: 5 nights accommodation in family-friendly hotels
Daily breakfast and dinner
Private vehicle for all transfers and sightseeing
Tsomgo Lake and Nathula Pass permits (if open)
Sikkim Himalayan Zoo and cable car entry fees

days.title: Arrive Gangtok - City Orientation
days.image: Gangtok city view aerial hillside Sikkim family holiday
activities: 1:00 PM - Arrive at NJP, private cab to Gangtok (4-5 hrs), check into family hotel
5:30 PM - Evening at MG Marg - kids enjoy street food: wai wai noodles, churpi (yak cheese)
7:00 PM - Gangtok night market, light family dinner, early rest for altitude acclimatization

days.title: Gangtok Sightseeing - Zoo & Ropeway
days.image: Sikkim Himalayan Zoological Park red panda snow leopard Gangtok
activities: 9:00 AM - Sikkim Himalayan Zoological Park - red pandas, snow leopards, Tibetan wolves (Rs.30 for kids)
12:00 PM - Tashi Viewpoint (north of Gangtok) for panoramic view of Kanchenjunga range on clear days
3:00 PM - Gangtok Ropeway (children love it), Enchey Monastery, Do Drul Chorten Stupa with prayer wheels

days.title: Tsomgo Lake & Baba Mandir Adventure
days.image: Tsomgo Lake yak ride family Sikkim altitude lake frozen
activities: 7:30 AM - Drive to Tsomgo Lake (1.5 hrs, 3753 m) - kids excited by yak rides and the magical alpine lake
11:00 AM - Baba Mandir (4,023 m) - incredible views and the story of Sapper Harbhajan Singh fascinates children
2:00 PM - Return to Gangtok, evening rest, hot chocolate and thukpa at a local cafe

days.title: Pelling - Monastery & Kanchenjunga Views
days.image: Pelling Kanchenjunga view sunrise West Sikkim mountain snow peak
activities: 8:00 AM - Drive from Gangtok to Pelling (115 km, 4 hrs via Ravangla)
1:00 PM - Pemayangtse Monastery - 300-yr-old monastery with 7-tiered wooden sculpture of Guru Rinpoche's heaven
4:00 PM - If weather clear, incredible Kanchenjunga sunset view from hotel/viewpoint (8,586m, world's 3rd highest)

days.title: Khecheopalri Lake & Rabdentse Ruins
days.image: Khecheopalri Lake sacred wish fulfilling lake West Sikkim forest
activities: 8:30 AM - Drive to sacred Khecheopalri Lake (12 km from Pelling) - the 'wish-fulfilling' lake, serene forest walk
11:00 AM - Rabdentse Ruins - second capital of Sikkim, stone ruins on a forest ridge with sweeping valley views
2:00 PM - Drive back to Pelling, afternoon at leisure, kids can spot birds in the monastery gardens

days.title: Yuksom & Departure
days.image: Yuksom first capital Sikkim Norbugang Throne coronation site forest
activities: 8:00 AM - Visit Yuksom (1 hr from Pelling) - the first capital of Sikkim, Norbugang Throne coronation site
10:00 AM - Dubdi Monastery (oldest in Sikkim, 1701) - short 30-min hike through forest, children enjoy treasure hunt
1:00 PM - Drive to NJP/Bagdogra (5-6 hrs) for onward journey

title: Sikkim Romantic Himalayan Retreat
description: Nestled in the folds of the mighty Himalayas, Sikkim offers one of the most romantic and surreal honeymoon experiences in India. Wake up to Kanchenjunga peering through morning clouds from your premium resort window, hold hands by sacred alpine lakes, and explore ancient Buddhist monasteries draped in prayer flags. This intimate journey through Sikkim's misty valleys and sky-high passes is tailor-made for new beginnings.
inclusions: 5 nights in premium romantic resorts with mountain views
Daily breakfast and special couple dinners
Private vehicle with decorated car on arrival day
Couple photography session at Pelling sunrise point
Tsomgo Lake and Nathula Pass permits

days.title: Arrival - Gangtok Romance Begins
days.image: Gangtok boutique hotel mountain view romantic couple Sikkim
activities: 1:00 PM - Private car with flower decoration picks you up from NJP, scenic drive to Gangtok (4-5 hrs)
6:00 PM - Sunset from Tashi Viewpoint over snow-capped Kanchenjunga range (on clear days)
7:30 PM - Candlelit welcome dinner at a rooftop restaurant on MG Marg, Sikkimese and continental menu

days.title: Monasteries & Cable Car Romance
days.image: Rumtek Monastery golden prayer flags blue sky Sikkim romantic
activities: 9:00 AM - Rumtek Monastery - largest in Sikkim, spiritual serenity and golden stupa
12:00 PM - Gangtok Ropeway romantic cable car ride, sweeping views of the entire city and hills
4:00 PM - Stroll through Namgyal Institute of Tibetology, evening quiet time at Do Drul Chorten Stupa

days.title: High Altitude Lake & Nathula Romance
days.image: Tsomgo Lake couple romantic Himalaya altitude misty Sikkim
activities: 8:00 AM - Drive to Tsomgo Lake (3,753 m) - romantic misty lake ringed by rhododendrons (blooms Apr-May)
11:00 AM - Nathula Pass (4,310 m, if permits available) - stand on the India-China border, incredible altitude experience
2:00 PM - Return to Gangtok, couples' hot spring experience at a local spa, evening at MG Marg shops

days.title: Journey to Pelling - Mountain Views
days.image: Pelling resort Kanchenjunga sunrise couple West Sikkim romance
activities: 8:00 AM - Scenic drive to Pelling (4 hrs) with stops at Ravangla Buddha Park and tea garden viewpoints
1:00 PM - Check in to premium Kanchenjunga-facing resort, afternoon enjoying the mountain view from room balcony
6:00 PM - Sunset dinner at resort with Kanchenjunga backdrop, Sikkim wines and local cuisine

days.title: Sacred Lake & Monastery Serenity
days.image: Khecheopalri Lake morning mist reflection West Sikkim forest
activities: 7:30 AM - Sunrise walk around Khecheopalri Lake - birds floating on glass-still water, prayer flag reflections
10:00 AM - Pemayangtse Monastery - couples receive monk blessing, explore the centuries-old murals
3:00 PM - Couples photography session at Rabdentse Ruins hilltop with Kanchenjunga backdrop

days.title: Yuksom & Farewell to the Mountains
days.image: Yuksom ancient forest mist Sikkim couple departure
activities: 8:30 AM - Gentle morning walk in Yuksom's ancient forests, visit Kathok Lake (quiet meditation point)
11:00 AM - Final mountain-view breakfast at resort, check out and departure photos
12:00 PM - Drive to NJP/Bagdogra (5-6 hrs), carry memories of the Himalayas forever

title: Sikkim High-Altitude Adventure
description: Push your limits in one of India's most adventurous territories with this high-altitude Sikkim adventure package. Trek through rhododendron forests to Dzongri views, kayak on the Teesta River, mountain bike down Gangtok's slopes, and attempt the legendary Goecha La trek approach. With altitudes soaring past 4,000 metres and landscapes straight from a Himalayan dream, every day is an achievement.
inclusions: 5 nights accommodation in trekking lodges and mountain camps
All meals (breakfast, lunch packed, dinner)
Certified trekking guide for all hikes
White-water rafting on Teesta River (Grade III)
Trekking permits and Inner Line Permits
exclusions: Personal trekking gear (rental available in Gangtok)

days.title: Arrive Gangtok - Acclimatize & Brief
days.image: Gangtok trekking preparation gear Sikkim adventure start
activities: 1:00 PM - Arrive NJP, drive to Gangtok, check in to trekkers lodge, gear check
4:00 PM - Acclimatization hike to Tashi Viewpoint (30-min gentle trail), altitude ~1,650 m
6:00 PM - Trek briefing with guide, equipment check, route planning for Yuksom-Dzongri trek

days.title: Teesta River Rafting - Adrenaline Rush
days.image: Teesta River white water rafting rapids Sikkim adventure
activities: 8:00 AM - Drive to Sirwani (52 km from Gangtok, 2 hrs) for Teesta River rafting put-in point
9:00 AM - 3-hour Grade III white-water rafting on Teesta River through the gorgeous Teesta Valley gorge
3:00 PM - Mountain biking rental in Gangtok (downhill trails, 2 hrs, helmet and pads provided)

days.title: Drive to Yuksom - Goecha La Trek Begins
days.image: Yuksom trekking start point Goecha La Sikkim dense forest trail
activities: 7:00 AM - Drive from Gangtok to Yuksom (115 km, 4 hrs) through Pelling
12:00 PM - Arrive Yuksom (1,780 m), Trek Base: register at forest office, get trekking permits
3:00 PM - Acclimatization walk to Kathok Lake (2 hrs loop trail) through rhododendron and oak forest

days.title: Yuksom to Tsokha Trek (9 km)
days.image: Yuksom Tsokha trekking trail rhododendron forest Sikkim green
activities: 6:30 AM - Trek start after early breakfast, trail through dense forest and waterfalls
12:00 PM - Reach Bakhim (2,750 m) after 6 km - lunch break at forest department hut
4:00 PM - Continue to Tsokha (3,050 m, 3 km more), basic camp, stargazing at altitude at night

days.title: Tsokha to Dzongri (11 km) - Panoramic Views
days.image: Dzongri top Kanchenjunga panorama trekking Sikkim high altitude
activities: 5:00 AM - Early start for long climb to Dzongri (4,030 m) through rhododendron forests
12:00 PM - Reach Dzongri, panoramic views of Kanchenjunga, Pandim, Kabru, and multiple glacial peaks
2:00 PM - Optional: Dzongri Top (30-min steep climb) for 360-degree Himalayan view, return camp for rest

days.title: Dzongri Descent & Return to Gangtok
days.image: Trekking descent Sikkim mountain forest valley river trail
activities: 6:00 AM - Early sunrise views from Dzongri Top (if not done yesterday), breakfast at camp
8:00 AM - Trek down to Yuksom (16 km descent, 6-7 hrs, knees test!)
5:00 PM - Reach Yuksom, drive to Gangtok or nearest town, well-earned dinner and rest

title: Sikkim Ultra-Luxury Mountain Escape
description: Experience Sikkim's majestic Himalayan splendour through an ultra-premium lens with personalised butler service, private monastery visits, exclusive helicopter rides over Kanchenjunga, and stays at Sikkim's finest mountain resorts. This package weaves together spiritual depth, adventure, and indulgence for the discerning traveller who demands the very best that the Himalayan kingdom has to offer.
inclusions: 6 nights in 5-star and boutique luxury mountain resorts
All meals with chef-curated Sikkimese cuisine
Private vehicle with experienced driver-guide throughout
Helicopter sightseeing over Kanchenjunga (20 min)
Private monastery visits with monk guide and blessing ceremony
exclusions: Additional helicopter rides beyond included one

days.title: Arrival - Luxury Himalayan Welcome
days.image: Elgin Nor-Khill heritage hotel Gangtok luxury Sikkim mountain
activities: 1:00 PM - Private luxury vehicle from NJP to Gangtok (4.5 hrs) with welcome refreshments in car
5:00 PM - Check in to Elgin Nor-Khill or Netuk House (heritage boutique hotel), welcome Sikkimese tea ceremony
7:30 PM - Private candlelit dinner at hotel with chef's special Sikkimese degustation menu and Himalayan views

days.title: Private Monastery Circuit & Ropeway
days.image: Rumtek Monastery private visit golden stupa Sikkim sunrise exclusive
activities: 8:00 AM - Exclusive private morning visit to Rumtek Monastery with resident lama (arranged after regular hours)
11:00 AM - Private Enchey Monastery prayer ceremony and monk blessing ritual
3:00 PM - Private ropeway cabin to Flower Exhibition Centre, exclusive Gangtok city panorama, dinner at rooftop bar

days.title: Helicopter & High Altitude Experience
days.image: Helicopter Kanchenjunga aerial view Sikkim snow peaks luxury flight
activities: 8:00 AM - Private helicopter sightseeing over Kanchenjunga range and Tsomgo Lake (20-30 min flight)
11:00 AM - Drive to Tsomgo Lake (permit included) - private yak and lakeside gourmet picnic arranged
3:00 PM - Nathula Pass visit (4,310 m, India-China border) with exclusive access arrangements

days.title: Pelling - Premium Mountain Resort
days.image: Pelling luxury resort Kanchenjunga view infinity pool West Sikkim
activities: 8:00 AM - Scenic drive to Pelling via Ravangla and Buddha Park (5 hrs with stops)
2:00 PM - Check in to Mayfair Spa Resort Gangtok or similar luxury property with Kanchenjunga panorama
5:00 PM - Private sunset viewing from resort's exclusive deck, personal butler service, evening spa treatment

days.title: Sacred Lakes & Monastery Wellness
days.image: Khecheopalri Lake sunrise mist prayer flags Sikkim luxury private
activities: 7:00 AM - Private sunrise car to Khecheopalri Lake, exclusive monk-guided lake puja ceremony
10:00 AM - Pemayangtse Monastery private visit and Rabdentse Ruins exclusive historian tour
3:00 PM - Return to resort for Himalayan hot stone massage and Tibetan singing bowl therapy (90 min)

days.title: North Sikkim - Zero Point Expedition
days.image: Zero Point North Sikkim snow covered road 4300m alpine landscape
activities: 5:00 AM - Private vehicle convoy to North Sikkim (permit included): Chungthang, Lachung, Yumthang Valley
12:00 PM - Yumthang Valley (Valley of Flowers, 3,564 m) - sea of rhododendrons in season, private lunch setup
4:00 PM - Continue to Zero Point (4,428 m) - the last Indian outpost, vast snowfields and silence

days.title: Farewell Spa Morning & Departure
days.image: Luxury hotel morning Sikkim mountain Kanchenjunga dawn goodbye
activities: 7:00 AM - Final sunrise Kanchenjunga view from exclusive resort terrace with champagne breakfast
9:30 AM - Farewell full-body Himalayan herb massage at resort spa (90 min)
12:00 PM - Checkout, private vehicle to NJP/Bagdogra (5 hrs), depart with lifetime mountain memories

title: Sikkim Monastery & Culture Trail
description: Sikkim is a living museum of Tibetan Buddhist culture, and this cultural trail reveals its spiritual soul through monastery visits, ancient coronation sites, and vibrant festival experiences. From Rumtek's golden stupa to the oldest monastery in Sikkim at Yuksom, the first capital Yuksom to the sacred Tashiding Monastery, this journey immerses you in 350 years of Himalayan Buddhist tradition.
inclusions: 4 nights accommodation in monastery guesthouses and heritage hotels
Daily breakfast and dinner
Private vehicle for sightseeing
Monastery entry fees and guided cultural explanations
Visit to Namgyal Institute of Tibetology

days.title: Arrive Gangtok - Buddhist Heritage
days.image: Do Drul Chorten Stupa prayer wheels Gangtok Sikkim Buddhist
activities: 1:00 PM - Arrive Gangtok, check in, freshen up
3:00 PM - Namgyal Institute of Tibetology - excellent museum of Buddhist manuscripts, thangkas, and ritual objects
5:00 PM - Do Drul Chorten Stupa - largest stupa in Sikkim, circumambulate the 108 prayer wheels at dusk

days.title: Rumtek & Enchey Monasteries
days.image: Rumtek Monastery Sikkim Karma Kagyu school golden roof prayer
activities: 8:30 AM - Rumtek Monastery (24 km) - seat of the Karma Kagyu school, Golden Stupa housing relics of the 16th Karmapa
11:30 AM - Rumtek Dharma Chakra Centre - large monk community, debate courtyard, religious art
3:00 PM - Enchey Monastery (Gangtok hilltop) - Nyingma-tradition, 200 years old, sweeping city views, evening prayers

days.title: Pelling - Pemayangtse & Rabdentse
days.image: Pemayangtse Monastery Pelling West Sikkim ancient Buddhist art
activities: 8:00 AM - Drive from Gangtok to Pelling (4 hrs) with Ravangla Buddha Park stop
2:00 PM - Pemayangtse Monastery (1705, oldest major monastery in Sikkim) - remarkable wooden Zangdok Palri sculpture
5:00 PM - Rabdentse Ruins (2nd capital of Sikkim) - stone ruins on a forested promontory, prayer flags, valley views

days.title: Tashiding Monastery & Khecheopalri
days.image: Tashiding Monastery sacred stupa thongwa rangdol Sikkim West
activities: 8:30 AM - Tashiding Monastery - one of Sikkim's holiest, Thongwa Rangdol stupa said to absolve all sins by sight
11:30 AM - Sacred Khecheopalri Lake (30 min from Tashiding) - birds remove any floating leaf, keeping it pristine
2:30 PM - Return to Pelling via Khecheopalri village and cardamom orchards

days.title: Yuksom - First Capital & Departure
days.image: Yuksom Norbugang coronation throne ancient first capital Sikkim
activities: 8:00 AM - Drive to Yuksom (1 hr from Pelling) - 1642 coronation site of first Chogyal king of Sikkim
9:30 AM - Dubdi Monastery (oldest monastery in Sikkim, 1701, 30-min forest hike to reach it)
12:00 PM - Drive to NJP/Bagdogra (5-6 hrs) for departure, rich with Buddhist heritage memories

title: Gangtok Weekend Mountain Escape
description: For a quick but fulfilling escape to the Himalayas, Gangtok delivers everything in a compact weekend getaway. Marvel at Kanchenjunga from a sunrise viewpoint, explore vibrant MG Marg, take the iconic ropeway over the city, and make a spiritual journey to the sacred Tsomgo Lake. It is the perfect short Himalayan retreat for those short on time but long on adventure.
inclusions: 2 nights accommodation in Gangtok hotel
Daily breakfast and dinner
Shared taxi from/to NJP
Tsomgo Lake excursion (shared vehicle, permit included)
Ropeway ticket and Enchey Monastery visit
exclusions: Nathula Pass permit and visit (extra cost)

days.title: Arrive Gangtok - First Himalayan Evening
days.image: Gangtok evening lights MG Marg hill station Sikkim weekend
activities: 1:00 PM - Shared taxi from NJP to Gangtok (4-5 hrs, scenic NH10 through Teesta Valley)
6:00 PM - MG Marg evening walk - food stalls, shops, cafe culture, try Sikkimese momos and wai-wai
8:00 PM - Dinner at Hotel Tibet Restaurant (try phaley, thenthuk, and chhurpi soup) on MG Marg

days.title: Tsomgo Lake & City Sights
days.image: Tsomgo Lake Chang Lake Sikkim altitude yak morning mist
activities: 7:30 AM - Drive to Tsomgo Lake (1.5 hrs, 3753 m) - stunning glacial lake, yak rides, snow if winter
11:30 AM - Return, lunch break at Gangtok, afternoon: Gangtok Ropeway cable car ride over the city
3:30 PM - Enchey Monastery and Do Drul Chorten Stupa walk, evening sunset from Tashi Viewpoint

days.title: Morning Monastery & Departure
days.image: Rumtek Monastery morning Gangtok Sikkim sunrise departure
activities: 8:00 AM - Morning drive to Rumtek Monastery (24 km, 45 min), golden stupa and prayer hall visit
10:30 AM - Return to Gangtok, quick souvenir shopping for thangkas, carpets, and Sikkim teas at MG Marg
12:00 PM - Shared taxi to NJP/Bagdogra for onward journey
